title: microlicia helvola
intro: Microlicia helvola, also known as the yellow microlicia, is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Microlicia helvola include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Microlicia helvola can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
